mundo.titulo: Andrew was sub-letting Royal Lodge cottages, watchdog reveals
mundo.resumen: A public spending watchdog examines the property arrangements of royals including Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor.

mundo.resumen: Cambridge scientists say they have, for the first time, tested a vaccine designed by AI.

mundo.titulo: Teen rapists spared jail partly because of intellectual limitations, judge's full remarks show
mundo.resumen: The boys' sentencing last month caused an outcry when they were given youth rehabilitation orders (YROs).

mundo.resumen: What stood out from the Question Time exchanges between candidates in the Makerfield by-election?

mundo.titulo: The deeply contentious debate around what it means to be English
mundo.resumen: The debate about English identity has been a perennial one but has now taken on a harder edge

mundo.titulo: A-level maths exam marking to be watched closely by regulator after students 'crestfallen'
mundo.resumen: More than 20,000 people sign a petition calling for a review of a paper they say was significantly more challenging than any past exam.

negocios.titulo: We need to stop AI developing without humans, says Anthropic co-founder
negocios.resumen: Jack Clark tells BBC's Newsnight AI could get to the point where it develops without human input.

negocios.titulo: Who can buy shares in Elon Musk's SpaceX?
negocios.resumen: From next week individual investors can take a stake in Musk's rockets-to-AI company.

negocios.titulo: Is there an AI stock market bubble, and is it ready to burst?
negocios.resumen: Despite the Iran war, inflation and debt fears, US markets keep hitting record highs, fueled largely by AI. BBC's Samira Hussain looks into whether that bubble will burst.

negocios.titulo: Hospitality jobs boom as US prepares for World Cup
negocios.resumen: It is the third month in a row US jobs figures have beaten expectations.

negocios.titulo: British Heart Foundation plans to close 150 charity shops
negocios.resumen: The charity says it is facing "an exceptionally challenging trading environment".

negocios.titulo: The ancient trick making food waste useful and tasty
negocios.resumen: Instead of throwing away byproducts of food processing, fermentation is making them valuable.

tecnologia.resumen: The Australian data center operator plans to set up 5GW of capacity in India.

tecnologia.titulo: Mira Murati steps back into the spotlight, carefully
tecnologia.resumen: In the current environment, remaining heads down has diminishing returns; at some point, you have to make some noise just to remind the market you exist.

tecnologia.resumen: The debut episode, moderated by Founders Fund chief marketing officer Mike Solana, included a star-studded cast of current tech luminaries.

tecnologia.titulo: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
tecnologia.resumen: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory faces a real test, though.

tecnologia.titulo: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
tecnologia.resumen: The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.

tecnologia.titulo: Filtr is a new privacy tool that blocks ads in almost every iPhone and Mac app
tecnologia.resumen: This popular ad blocker app for iPhones, iPads, and Macs can now block ads from loading inside apps, including web browsers, thanks to a new feature in the latest Apple software.

tecnologia.titulo: This chunky little tablet got my kid to clean up his toys
tecnologia.resumen: Never underestimate the power that a cheap tablet holds over a kid under six. The Skylight Buddy is a device with one job: to be a cute little guy that helps your kid track routines and chores. It's $139.99, plus an optional subscription. tecnologia.titulo: I customized a MacBook Neo with colorful spare parts
tecnologia.resumen: The MacBook Neo is Apple's cheapest laptop, its most colorful, and its easiest to repair in years. tecnologia.titulo: Porsche’s Cayenne Coupe Turbo will even make 911 owners nervous
tecnologia.resumen: Back in 2002, Porsche fans sputtered with rage as the Cayenne made its debut at the Paris Motor. More than 20 years later, Porsche now sells more SUVs than anything else in its lineup. Last year, the Macan and Cayenne accounted for 62 percent of all Porsche sales. tecnologia.titulo: Valve says it’s ready to launch the Steam Machine this summer
tecnologia.resumen: Valve now says that the delayed Steam Machine PC and Steam Frame VR headset are set to launch sometime this summer. tecnologia.titulo: Cyberdecks used to look like little laptops, but now they’re getting more personal
tecnologia.resumen: DIYer and TikTok user Annike Tan, who goes by @ubeboobey, can carry her cyberdeck around without anyone noticing because it doesn't look like a computer at all.
